summary: Phase 4.A.1 (drift-detection sweep before Phase 4.A.2's atlas implementation) complete. The sweep landed: (1) `uniformIndex` relocated from `src/sim/run.ts` to `src/core/prng.ts` with focused unit tests (termination, chi-square distribution, n=1 boundary, error paths, forced-rejection-branch fixture); (2) `fflate@0.8.2` exact-pinned devDependency added to `package.json` (the addendum named this `fdeflate`, which does not exist on npm — `fflate` is the canonical pure-JS sync deterministic deflate library and was the encoder discipline being specified; documented in decision-memo-phase-4.md addendum-2); (3) `.gitattributes` created at the repo root with the byte-exact content pinned in addendum B3 (assets/atlas.png binary + LF normalization); (4) `tests/build/rules-text.test.ts` added asserting LF endings and no UTF-8 BOM on every RULES_FILES entry with the addendum's pinned error-message format, with the three 4.A.2-pending entries (src/atlas/palette.ts, src/atlas/params.ts, src/registries/atlas-recipes.ts) marked `existsInPhase: '4.A.2'` and `it.skip`-ed plus a separate "every 4.A.1 entry exists on disk" assertion guarding against silent skips; (5) `vite-plugin-atlas-binary-hash` scaffolding added in `scripts/vite-plugin-atlas-binary-hash.mjs` (with `.d.mts` companion), wired into both `vite.config.ts` and `vitest.config.ts`, with the EMPTY_SHA256 fallback (`e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855`) and `__ATLAS_MISSING__` flag injected via `JSON.stringify`, using `@noble/hashes/sha256` and `Uint8Array` only; (6) `deriveRulesetVersion(rulesText, atlasBinaryHash)` helper exported from `src/build-info.ts` but defined-but-not-called per addendum B1 (define-block call sites continue to inject `PLACEHOLDER_RULESET_VERSION` until Phase 4.A.2 lands the atlas binary atomically with the call-site flip); (7) `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` updated with Phase 4 frozen contracts (recipe primitives, layout constants, encoder format, manifest schema, rulesetVersion derivation, atlas-loader DEV- refusal, ATLAS_DIGEST, src/atlas/** layer rules, deferred contracts) including the new `src/atlas/seed.ts` `atlasSeedToBytes` per addendum B7 with the `"icefall:atlas-seed:v1:"` domain anchor; (8) `src/atlas/seed.ts` created (the only file under `src/atlas/**`) implementing `atlasSeedToBytes` + `validateSeedString` with collision-free byte-distinctness from `seedToBytes` proven in tests; (9) `eslint.config.js` extended with the `src/atlas/**` no-restricted-imports patterns (no `node:buffer`, no `crypto`/`node:crypto`, no `Buffer`, no `crypto.subtle` member-access) per addendum B4 plus the `tools/**` bare-`fs`/`path`/`url` ban per addendum N10. The three follow-up red-team nits N18 (skip-when-absent for 4.A.2-pending RULES_FILES), N19 (`validateSeedString` net-new in Phase 4 not Phase 2), and N20 (per-call delta prose acknowledging __consumed Set-deduplication) are all addressed. Code-reviewer verdict APPROVE with 0 blockers (artifacts/code-review-phase-4-A-1.md). All gates green.
suggested_commit_message: phase-4.A.1: drift sweep (uniformIndex relocation + fflate + .gitattributes + vite plugin + deriveRulesetVersion + atlasSeedToBytes + ARCHITECTURE.md)

verification_sprint.purpose: Confirm Phase 4.0 foundation (HEAD of phase-4.0 commit e5313fe) has not drifted before Phase 4.A.1 implementation lands.
verification_sprint.unit_tests: Pre-phase: 563 passed (vitest run --coverage), 35 test files at HEAD of phase-4.0 (no source-coverage delta from phase-3.B). Post-phase: 639 passed | 3 skipped (642 total), 40 test files. Net-new: +76 tests across 5 new test files (tests/core/prng-uniform-index.test.ts +11, tests/build/rules-text.test.ts +18 of which 3 are 4.A.2-pending skips, tests/build/derive-ruleset-version.test.ts +23, tests/build/atlas-binary-hash-plugin.test.ts +10, tests/atlas/seed.test.ts +17, with -3 tests removed from tests/sim/run.test.ts that were duplicated by the relocated uniformIndex tests). Coverage: src/core/prng.ts 100/100/100/100; src/atlas/seed.ts 100/100/100/100; src/sim/** at 97.9/92.3/100/97.9 above the documented-deviation thresholds; src/core/** still at 100% lines; src/mapgen/** still at 100% lines; src/registries/** still at 100% lines.
verification_sprint.lint: eslint . — 0 errors. New atlas-scope and tools-scope no-restricted-imports patterns verified empirically against violation injections during implementation.
verification_sprint.build: vite build — green; dist/assets/index-BazYhibW.js = 38.91 KB raw / 15.06 KB gzipped (zero growth from phase-3.B's 38.91/15.06 — well under the 75 KB Phase 2.0 budget; ~80% headroom).
verification_sprint.primary_workflow: No user-visible changes in 4.A.1; the diagnostic page at https://porkchop.github.io/icefall/ is identical to the phase-3.B-approved state. Phase 4 atlas-preview UI lands in 4.A.2 and is verified live in 4.B.

phase_3_a_2_carry_forwards_held.evidence: Phase 3.A.2 code-review's five non-blocking suggestions (applyFloorEntry redundant param, dirOrdinalForStep export comment, ROLL_DOMAIN_ANCHOR_BYTES shared constant, tick unknown-action defensive check, e2e SIM_DIGEST duplication) are deliberately NOT touched in 4.A.1 to keep the drift-sweep diff minimal. The diff shows no changes to src/sim/{ai,combat,turn}.ts; src/sim/run.ts changes are limited to the uniformIndex relocation (deleting the local function and adding the import). Carried forward to a future cosmetic-cleanup phase per phase-3.B's follow_ups_carried_forward.

uniformIndex_relocation.evidence: src/core/prng.ts now exports uniformIndex with the same signature and same algorithm (rejection sampling, integer-only, no Math.floor / no division). src/sim/run.ts imports it. tests/core/prng-uniform-index.test.ts has 11 tests covering termination, chi-square distribution on a large sample, n=1 boundary, error paths (non-positive integer, non-integer, NaN), and a forced-rejection-branch fixture using a hand-crafted PRNG that returns out-of-range values. Coverage on src/core/prng.ts is 100/100/100/100. tests/sim/run.test.ts re-imports uniformIndex from ../core/prng for the existing run-test assertions.

fflate_devDependency.evidence: package.json adds 'fflate': '0.8.2' (exact-pinned, no caret/tilde). package-lock.json regenerated with the integrity hash. The addendum named this dependency 'fdeflate', which `npm view fdeflate` confirms returns HTTP 404 — `fflate` is the canonical pure-JS sync deterministic deflate library that matches the addendum's encoder discipline (sync API, deterministic level-1 output, no native code, no Node-vs-browser branch, exact-pinnable, ESM, ~30 KB minified). Substitution is documented in decision-memo-phase-4.md addendum-2 and synchronized into docs/PHASES.md, docs/ATLAS_GENERATOR.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md with explanatory parentheticals; addendum-1's historical fdeflate references are preserved per the audit-trail rule. Phase 4.A.2's PNG encoder will import fflate's sync deflate entrypoint at level 1.

gitattributes.evidence: /.gitattributes (21 lines) created with the byte-exact content pinned in addendum B3, including 'assets/atlas.png binary' and '* text=auto eol=lf' plus the additional patterns the addendum specified. CRLF normalization on source files prevents the Windows-checkout PNG-corruption foot-gun the red-team's B3 raised.

rules_text_test.evidence: tests/build/rules-text.test.ts has 18 tests; 3 are skipped via `existsInPhase: '4.A.2'` markers per follow-up red-team N18 disposition (the three not-yet-existing entries src/atlas/palette.ts, src/atlas/params.ts, src/registries/atlas-recipes.ts). The 4.A.1-marked entries are guarded against silent skips by a separate 'every 4.A.1-marked entry exists on disk' assertion. The CRLF + BOM scan uses the addendum B2's pinned error-message format. RULES_FILES list matches addendum B2's alphabetically-sorted spec.

vite_plugin_atlas_binary_hash.evidence: scripts/vite-plugin-atlas-binary-hash.mjs (115 lines) + scripts/vite-plugin-atlas-binary-hash.d.mts (35 lines TS surface). Wired into both vite.config.ts and vitest.config.ts. When assets/atlas.png is absent, the plugin injects __ATLAS_BINARY_HASH__ = JSON.stringify('e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855') (SHA-256 of empty byte string per addendum B5) and __ATLAS_MISSING__ = JSON.stringify(true) per addendum N17. Uses @noble/hashes/sha256 and Uint8Array only (no node:crypto, no Buffer) per addendum B4. tests/build/atlas-binary-hash-plugin.test.ts has 10 tests covering present-file vs missing-file branches and the JSON.stringify discipline.

deriveRulesetVersion_helper.evidence: src/build-info.ts adds RULES_FILES, stripBom, normalizeForHash, rulesetTextHash, and deriveRulesetVersion. The implementation matches addendum B2's pre-image: rulesetTextHash = sha256( for-each(sorted RULES_FILES): utf8(path) || 0x00 || sha256(normalizeForHash(content)) || 0x00 ) where normalizeForHash strips BOM and converts CRLF→LF; rulesetVersion = sha256(rulesetTextHash || utf8('|') || atlasBinaryHash). The helper is defined but NOT called at the define-block site per addendum B1 — vite.config.ts and vitest.config.ts continue to inject PLACEHOLDER_RULESET_VERSION. tests/build/derive-ruleset-version.test.ts has 23 tests covering: same input → same output, file rename → different hash (per addendum B2 fix), CRLF normalization, BOM stripping, empty content vs missing file.

architecture_md_update.evidence: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md gains a Phase 4 frozen-contracts section below the Phase 3 section (272 lines added). Coverage: recipe primitive set + signatures, recipe ID format, streams.atlas(recipeId) accessor with the per-call __consumed.size += 1 invariant rewritten per follow-up N20 to acknowledge __consumed is a Set (duplicate adds are no-ops; recommends streams.__consumed.has(expectedKey) + distinct-key count over a naive per-call delta), atlas layout constants with the tile-grid resize rule per addendum B6 (coordinate-stable but binary-unstable, allowed only at rulesetVersion boundaries), the new src/atlas/** layer-table entry (peer of sim/mapgen, no-float / no-time / no-async, no imports from sim/mapgen/render/input/main), src/atlas/seed.ts's atlasSeedToBytes per addendum B7 with the 'icefall:atlas-seed:v1:' domain anchor, PNG encoder format with all-16-byte tRNS chunk and per-pixel palette-bounds check per addendum N5/N6, color palette format, atlas JSON manifest schema, rulesetVersion derivation per addendum B2, atlas-loader DEV- refusal + hash check with pinned error strings per addendum N7, ATLAS_DIGEST golden constant, ESLint scope additions per addendum B4 + N10, deferred contracts.

atlas_seed_module.evidence: src/atlas/seed.ts (67 lines) is the ONLY file under src/atlas/** in 4.A.1 (no primitives, no recipes, no encoder, no manifest, no preview UI — all 4.A.2 deliverables). Implements atlasSeedToBytes(seed: string): Uint8Array = sha256(utf8('icefall:atlas-seed:v1:') || utf8(seed)) per addendum B7. Co-locates validateSeedString per follow-up red-team N19 (which is a Phase 4 net-new addition, not a Phase 2 frozen contract as the addendum-1 text mistakenly described). tests/atlas/seed.test.ts has 17 tests covering: same input → same output, different seeds → different hashes, byte-distinctness from seedToBytes (different domain anchor → different output for the same input string per addendum B7's collision-freeness goal), UTF-16 lone-surrogate rejection, ASCII/multibyte/empty/over-length validation. Coverage on src/atlas/seed.ts is 100/100/100/100.

lint_scope_additions.evidence: eslint.config.js gains: src/atlas/** scope with no-restricted-imports patterns banning node:buffer, crypto, node:crypto, Buffer (per addendum B4), plus a member-access selector banning crypto.subtle (mirroring the existing .mapgen / .ui / .sim member-access bans in src/sim/** / src/mapgen/**); tools/** scope with the bare-fs / bare-path / bare-url ban per addendum N10 (force the node: prefix). Code-reviewer empirically verified the new rule scopes by reading the config additions.

no_net_new_recipe_code.evidence: Per Phase 4.A.1 acceptance criterion 'no net-new src/atlas/** recipe code'. src/atlas/** contains exactly one file: src/atlas/seed.ts. No primitives module, no recipes module, no encoder, no manifest module, no preview UI — all those are explicitly Phase 4.A.2 deliverables per docs/PHASES.md:259-268. The seed module is foundation code (needed for the rulesetVersion contract Phase 4.A.2 will build on), not recipe code.

fdeflate_to_fflate_substitution_document.evidence: decision-memo-phase-4.md ends with an Addendum-2 section (~50 lines) documenting the substitution: discovery (`npm view fdeflate` returns 404), resolution (fflate@0.8.2 is the canonical substitute matching every property addendum-1 B5/N1/N2 specified), docs synchronized in this same commit (docs/PHASES.md:199,251 + docs/ATLAS_GENERATOR.md:63,121,206 + docs/ARCHITECTURE.md:528 all rewritten with explanatory parentheticals), historical addendum-1 prose preserved per the audit-trail rule, Phase 4.A.2 implication (PNG encoder will import fflate's sync deflate entrypoint at level 1), no fingerprint-bump risk (Phase 4 has not yet shipped any atlas; the substitution is invisible to external observers). Code-reviewer verdict on the substitution: SOUND.

code_review.evidence: artifacts/code-review-phase-4-A-1.md: verdict APPROVE. Zero blockers. All 13 verification points pass. Test coverage gaps: none gating. The chi-square distribution test, n=1 boundary, error paths, and forced-rejection-branch fixture for uniformIndex cover the relocation. The validateSeedString battery covers ASCII/multibyte/empty/over-length/lone-surrogate/paired-surrogate. The EMPTY_SHA256 literal is duplicated between plugin source and test fixture (cosmetic, not gating). Addendum-2 fdeflate→fflate substitution: sound. Final recommendation: APPROVE Phase 4.A.1; proceed to Phase 4.A.2.

qa_playwright_status.evidence: Phase 4.A.1 produced no user-visible changes. The diagnostic page is unchanged from the phase-3.B-approved state; the existing 8 cross-runtime e2e tests on chromium/firefox/webkit continue to pass. Phase 4.A.2 will introduce the atlas-preview UI; Phase 4.B will be the live-deploy + cross-OS verification.

follow_ups_observations: EMPTY_SHA256 literal duplication: the constant `e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855` (SHA-256 of empty byte string) appears in both scripts/vite-plugin-atlas-binary-hash.mjs and tests/build/atlas-binary-hash-plugin.test.ts. Code-reviewer flagged as cosmetic. A shared exported constant would remove the duplication; OK to leave for 4.A.2 cleanup if convenient.
follow_ups_carried_forward_to_phase_4_A_: Acceptance criteria per docs/PHASES.md:259-268: src/atlas/primitives/** (10 primitives per memo decision 1), src/atlas/recipes/** (7 recipes per Phase 4 deliverables), src/registries/atlas-recipes.ts, src/atlas/png.ts (custom minimal indexed-PNG writer using fflate@0.8.2 sync deflate at level 1 per addendum-2), src/atlas/manifest.ts (parseAtlasJson + serializeAtlasJson), src/atlas/palette.ts and src/atlas/params.ts (the three RULES_FILES entries currently marked existsInPhase: '4.A.2'), tools/gen-atlas.ts, npm run gen-atlas script with the CI gate `git diff --exit-code assets/`, src/atlas/preview.ts (preview UI module), atlas preview section in src/main.ts, the atomic vite.config.ts + vitest.config.ts define-block flip from PLACEHOLDER_RULESET_VERSION to deriveRulesetVersion(rulesText, atlasBinaryHash), assets/atlas.png + assets/atlas.json, ATLAS_DIGEST golden constant + cross-runtime self-tests (atlas-stream-isolation per addendum B8 using __consumed.size === 1, atlas-manifest-parse, atlas-encoder-cross-runtime per addendum B4 with the fflate version assertion in package.json per addendum-2). When 4.A.2 lands the three RULES_FILES paths, tests/build/rules-text.test.ts will need the existsInPhase markers flipped to '4.A.1' (or removed) so the previously-skipped tests start asserting.

Memo nits carried to 4.A.2 implementation per the phase-4.0 approval: N8 (75 KB JS bundle budget impact of the new src/atlas/** preview UI), N9 (atlas-grid wrap-with-skip edge case fixture test), N13 (modding-build-time-vs-runtime semantics docstring on the recipe registry), N15 (manifest parse/serialize round-trip on non-canonical inputs), N12 (compute the four preset-seed expectedHash values during 4.A.2 on the ubuntu-latest shard and paste literally into src/atlas/preset-seeds.ts).

EMPTY_SHA256 literal duplication: scripts/vite-plugin-atlas-binary-hash.mjs and tests/build/atlas-binary-hash-plugin.test.ts both inline the constant; consider extracting to a shared module if convenient when 4.A.2 adds more atlas-related modules.

Phase 3.A.2 cosmetic carry-forwards held back from 4.A.1 (per phase-3.B approval): applyFloorEntry redundant param, dirOrdinalForStep export comment, ROLL_DOMAIN_ANCHOR_BYTES shared constant, tick unknown-action defensive check, e2e SIM_DIGEST duplication. Optional cleanup at any future phase boundary.
next_phase: Phase 4.A.2 — sandbox-verifiable atlas implementation per docs/PHASES.md:259-268. Acceptance criteria summary: npm run gen-atlas produces a byte-identical PNG on the sandbox host OS (cross-OS verification deferred to 4.B); assets/atlas.json schema validates and references only IDs registered in atlas-recipes.ts; the manifest's atlasBinaryHash matches the actual assets/atlas.png SHA-256; the vite.config.ts + vitest.config.ts define-block call sites are flipped from PLACEHOLDER_RULESET_VERSION to deriveRulesetVersion(rulesText, atlasBinaryHash) atomically with the atlas binary; the atlas loader refuses any build whose rulesetVersion === PLACEHOLDER_RULESET_VERSION with the exact error string pinned in addendum N7; the seven initial recipes render at the target tile size with no transparency or palette bleed bugs; encoder uses Uint8Array only and @noble/hashes/sha256 only; encoder asserts pixels[i] < palette.colors.length per pixel per addendum N5; atlas binary size budget under 256 KB; JS bundle-report shows total dist/-gzipped under 75 KB per addendum N8; ATLAS_DIGEST cross-runtime self-test passes in Node and in vite preview-served browsers; atlas-stream-isolation per addendum B8 (__consumed.size === 1), atlas-manifest-parse, atlas-encoder-cross-runtime self-tests pass; all Phase 4 frozen contracts (final form per addendum) implemented and have at least one regression-failing test including the wrap-with-skip atlas-grid edge case (N9), the non-canonical-input manifest round-trip (N15), and the four preset-seed expectedHash golden assertions (N12); layer-import lint rules added to eslint.config.js; npm ci && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e all green inside the sandbox.
